embeds.title: Sentry issue
embeds.description: A new production error was reported.

mockCodexResult.summary: A study session was missing during lookup.
mockCodexResult.rootCause: The request referenced a session that no longer exists.
evidence: Sentry event message reports missing study session
mockCodexResult.discordReply: 원인은 이미 사라진 study session 참조로 보입니다. 재현 빈도가 낮아 원인만 남깁니다.
